subject: animals/butterfly

subject: animals/butterfly

name: Blue Morpho Butterfly
subject: animals/butterfly
prompt: a blue morpho butterfly with broad rounded wings shown fully open, smooth sweeping shapes inside the wings and a ring of small eye spots near the edges, a plump fuzzy body and gently curved antennae

name: Butterfly on a Flower
subject: animals/butterfly

subject: animals/butterfly

name: Butterfly Close-Up
subject: animals/butterfly
prompt: a large detailed close-up of a single butterfly filling the frame, intricate lacy patterns of swirls, dots, and tiny scales across both wings, a textured body and finely curled antennae, fully spread wings

name: Two Butterflies
subject: animals/butterfly

name: Butterfly in the Garden
subject: animals/butterfly

name: Symmetrical Wing Pattern
subject: animals/butterfly
